evals.name: create-basic-agent
evals.prompt: Write a Python function that creates an agno Agent with the name 'ExtractionAgent', using MistralChat model with temperature 0.0, and SurrealDB for memory storage. Include a description and instructions.
evals.expected_output: A function that returns an agno Agent instance configured for extraction

evals.name: add-tools-to-agent
evals.prompt: Write a function that creates an agno Agent and adds two tool functions to it: create_record and update_record. The tools should be imported from src.tools.surreal_tools.
evals.expected_output: A function that creates an Agent with tools configured
expectations: Tools are passed as a list to the tools parameter

evals.name: configure-agent-memory
evals.prompt: Write a function that configures SurrealDB memory for an agno Agent. Use the ONTO-AEC namespace 'aec' and database 'agent_memory'. The URL should be converted from http to ws format.
evals.expected_output: A function that creates a SurrealDb configuration for agent memory
expectations: Creates SurrealDb instance with correct namespace
Uses ws:// URL format for WebSocket connection

evals.name: pipeline-orchestration
evals.prompt: Write a Python class that orchestrates a 3-agent pipeline: IngestionAgent, ExtractionAgent, and StructuringAgent. Include a process method that calls each agent sequentially.
evals.expected_output: A class with sequential agent orchestration
expectations: Has a process method that is async
Calls agents in sequence (ingestion → extraction → structuring)

evals.name: set-agent-instructions
evals.prompt: Write a function that creates an agno Agent with specific instructions for an AEC ontology extraction specialist. The instructions should include extracting concepts, identifying relationships, and preserving source section references.
evals.expected_output: A function that creates an Agent with domain-specific instructions
expectations: Creates an Agent with appropriate name
Instructions are provided as a list of strings
